name: Grid Node Not Connected
description: Detects StorageGRID nodes that are not in a connected state. Disconnected nodes cannot serve data and may cause data unavailability.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, type, state, software_version FROM sg_nodes WHERE system_id = ? AND state != 'connected'
remediation_template: Node '{{name}}' (type: {{type}}) is in '{{state}}' state. Check network connectivity, node services, and hardware health. Reconnect the node to the grid.

name: Active Critical Alerts
description: Detects active critical-severity alerts in StorageGRID that require immediate attention.
check_query: SELECT system_id, alert_id, rule_name, severity, status, triggered_at FROM sg_alerts WHERE system_id = ? AND severity = 'critical' AND status = 'active'
remediation_template: Critical alert '{{rule_name}}' (ID: {{alert_id}}) is active since {{triggered_at}}. Investigate and resolve the underlying issue immediately to prevent data loss or service disruption.

name: Active Major Alerts
description: Detects active major-severity alerts in StorageGRID that may impact operations.
check_query: SELECT system_id, alert_id, rule_name, severity, status, triggered_at FROM sg_alerts WHERE system_id = ? AND severity = 'major' AND status = 'active'
remediation_template: Major alert '{{rule_name}}' (ID: {{alert_id}}) is active since {{triggered_at}}. Investigate the root cause and plan remediation to prevent escalation.

name: Storage Pool Capacity Warning
description: Detects storage pools with used capacity between 80% and 90%. High utilization may trigger ILM policy failures.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, CAST(used_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 AS used_pct FROM sg_storage_pools WHERE system_id = ? AND CAST(used_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 > 80 AND CAST(used_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 <= 90
remediation_template: Storage pool '{{name}}' is at {{used_pct | round(1)}}% capacity. Add storage nodes, expand the pool, or review ILM policies to move data to other pools.

name: Storage Pool Capacity Critical
description: Detects storage pools with used capacity exceeding 90%. Critically full pools will cause object ingest failures.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, CAST(used_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 AS used_pct FROM sg_storage_pools WHERE system_id = ? AND CAST(used_bytes AS REAL) / NULLIF(capacity_bytes, 0) * 100 > 90
remediation_template: Storage pool '{{name}}' is critically full at {{used_pct | round(1)}}% capacity. Immediately add storage capacity or delete unnecessary objects to prevent ingest failures.

name: Certificate Expiring Soon
description: Detects SSL/TLS certificates that will expire within the next 30 days. Expired certificates cause service disruptions and security warnings.
check_query: SELECT system_id, not_after, purpose FROM sg_certificates WHERE system_id = ? AND not_after IS NOT NULL AND not_after <= datetime('now', '+30 days') AND not_after > datetime('now')
remediation_template: Certificate for '{{purpose}}' expires on {{not_after}}. Renew the certificate before expiration to prevent service disruptions and client connection failures.

name: Certificate Expired
description: Detects SSL/TLS certificates that have already expired. Expired certificates will cause connection failures.
check_query: SELECT system_id, not_after, purpose FROM sg_certificates WHERE system_id = ? AND not_after IS NOT NULL AND not_after <= datetime('now')
remediation_template: Certificate for '{{purpose}}' expired on {{not_after}}. Immediately replace the certificate to restore secure communications.

name: No Active ILM Policy
description: Checks if there is no active ILM policy. Without an active policy, object data placement and protection are not enforced.
check_query: SELECT ? AS system_id WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sg_ilm_policies WHERE system_id = ? AND status = 'active')
remediation_template: No active ILM policy found. Create and activate an ILM policy immediately to ensure proper object placement, erasure coding, and data protection.

name: Bucket Versioning Not Enabled
description: Detects buckets that do not have object versioning enabled. Without versioning, accidental deletions or overwrites cannot be recovered.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, object_count, data_bytes FROM sg_buckets WHERE system_id = ? AND (versioning IS NULL OR versioning = 'disabled' OR versioning = '')
remediation_template: Bucket '{{name}}' does not have versioning enabled. Enable versioning to protect against accidental deletions and support compliance requirements.

name: Network Interface Link Down
description: Detects network interfaces with a link status of down. Down links can cause node isolation or degraded performance.
check_query: SELECT system_id, interface_name, link_status FROM sg_network WHERE system_id = ? AND link_status = 'down'
remediation_template: Network interface '{{interface_name}}' link is down. Check cable connections, switch port configuration, and NIC status. Restore connectivity to prevent node isolation.

name: NTP Servers Not Configured
description: Detects grids without NTP server configuration. Accurate time synchronization is critical for grid operations, replication, and audit logging.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, version FROM sg_grids WHERE system_id = ? AND (ntp_servers IS NULL OR ntp_servers = '' OR ntp_servers = '[]')
remediation_template: Grid '{{name}}' has no NTP servers configured. Configure at least 3 NTP servers via Grid Manager > Maintenance > NTP to ensure accurate time synchronization.

name: Storage Node Offline
description: Detects storage nodes that are offline or in an unknown state. Offline storage nodes reduce data availability and ILM compliance.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, type, state FROM sg_nodes WHERE system_id = ? AND type = 'storage' AND state NOT IN ('connected', 'online')
remediation_template: Storage node '{{name}}' is in '{{state}}' state. This impacts data availability and ILM compliance. Investigate hardware, network, and services on this node immediately.

name: Admin Node Not Connected
description: Detects admin nodes that are not in a connected state. Admin nodes are essential for grid management, monitoring, and auditing.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, type, state FROM sg_nodes WHERE system_id = ? AND type = 'admin' AND state != 'connected'
remediation_template: Admin node '{{name}}' is in '{{state}}' state. Restore the admin node to maintain grid management capabilities and audit log continuity.

name: Large Bucket Without Object Lifecycle
description: Detects buckets with more than 1 million objects that may benefit from lifecycle management policies to control growth.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, object_count, data_bytes FROM sg_buckets WHERE system_id = ? AND object_count > 1000000
remediation_template: Bucket '{{name}}' contains {{object_count}} objects ({{data_bytes}} bytes). Consider implementing S3 lifecycle policies to automatically expire or transition objects and manage storage costs.

name: Mixed Software Versions Across Nodes
description: Detects nodes running different software versions than others in the same grid. Mixed versions indicate an incomplete upgrade.
check_query: SELECT n.system_id, n.name, n.software_version, g.version AS grid_version FROM sg_nodes n JOIN sg_grids g ON n.system_id = g.system_id WHERE n.system_id = ? AND n.software_version != g.version
remediation_template: Node '{{name}}' is running version {{software_version}} while the grid is at {{grid_version}}. Complete the upgrade process for all nodes to ensure consistency and compatibility.

name: Gateway Node Not Connected
description: Detects gateway nodes that are not in a connected state. Gateway nodes provide load balancing for S3/Swift clients.
check_query: SELECT system_id, name, type, state FROM sg_nodes WHERE system_id = ? AND type = 'gateway' AND state != 'connected'
remediation_template: Gateway node '{{name}}' is in '{{state}}' state. Client traffic may be impacted. Check node health and restore connectivity.
